div.head: The British Ambassador (Halifax) to the Secretary of State Transmitted to the Secretary of State by the British Ambassador in note dated July 13, 1943.
div.p: Following sent by Prime Minister to President on July 10th No. 357.
I am most grateful to you for your number 308.For draft text, see p. 323.

I am in complete accord with your suggestions, which will provide a solution for our difficulties in Spain. As soon as I hear from you that you have issued the directives to Generals Eisenhower and Giraud and to American Ambassador in Madrid and Lisbon, I will give complementary instructions to our authorities.
